channel.title: Traffic Torch Blog
channel.description: Instant SEO & UX health analysis deep-dives, fixes, and trends

item.title: Semantic Entity Optimization Help Guide
item.description: How to boost modern SEO, local/geo visibility, and answer engine results. Discover how Traffic Torch’s Entity Extractor audits your page across six key semantic layers and the highest-ROI optimizations you can apply today.

item.title: AI Voice Search Help Guide
item.description: Complete 2026 guide to optimizing for voice search: conversational keywords, featured snippets, schema markup and AI assistant ranking strategies. Plus the 5 critical modules Traffic Torch uses to evaluate voice search readiness, and the highest-ROI optimizations you can implement right now.

item.title: Schema Markup Help Guide
item.description: What each schema type is, when to use it, and why it matters for rich results, higher CTR, and better traffic in 2026. From core types like Organization & Article to advanced ones like JobPosting, Course, FactCheck & more.

item.title: State of SEO & GEO in 2026: In-Depth Data from Latest Reports
item.description: It’s March 2026 — blue-link rankings are fading fast as AI Overviews dominate. Real data on traffic evaporation (58–61% drops), citation tracking pivot, and treating ChatGPT/Gemini/Perplexity as primary surfaces.

item.title: The Ultimate SEO & UX Audit Guide: What Traffic Torch Actually Measures & Why It Matters?
item.description: Complete breakdown of Traffic Torch’s instant 360° SEO + UX health score — what each metric checks, how scores are calculated, why they matter for rankings/conversions, and fastest fixes.

item.title: Mastering SEO Intent: E-E-A-T, Depth, Readability & Schema – Full Help Guide
item.description: How Traffic Torch measures true search intent alignment — E-E-A-T signals, content depth, readability scores, schema usage, and optimizations to match user expectations.

item.title: Product SEO Help Guide: Boost Rankings & Sales for Your Ecommerce Pages
item.description: Every metric Traffic Torch uses for product page SEO — structured data, images, pricing schema, reviews, mobile UX, and fixes to drive higher rankings and conversions.

item.title: User Experience Help Guide: How to Slash Quit Risk & Keep Visitors Longer
item.description: Traffic Torch UX metrics explained — Core Web Vitals, mobile usability, readability, visual hierarchy, quit risk scoring, and proven fixes to boost dwell time and reduce bounces.

item.title: SEO Keyword Help Guide: Optimize Your Page for Better Rankings
item.description: Strategic keyword placement guide — titles, headings, content density, images alt, anchors, URLs — using Traffic Torch insights to signal relevance and improve rankings.

item.title: Ultimate AI Search Optimization Help Guide: Boost Your SEO with Traffic Torch
item.description: Optimize for AI engines (SGE, Perplexity, etc.) — 8-key metrics from Traffic Torch: answerability, EEAT, structured data, scannability, and more for featured citations.

item.title: Local SEO Mastery: NAP, Keywords, Schema & More – Full Help Guide
item.description: How Traffic Torch audits local SEO health in seconds — NAP consistency, local keywords, schema markup, Google Business Profile signals, and quick wins for better local pack visibility.

item.title: How to Detect AI-Generated Content: 5 Metrics + Free AI Audit Tool Help Guide
item.description: Traffic Torch’s 5 metrics for spotting AI-written content — perplexity, burstiness, repetition patterns, predictability, and how to humanize for better rankings.

item.title: Ultimate Guide to Beating Competitors with On-Page SEO 2026
item.description: Educational deep-dive into Traffic Torch’s Keyword VS / Competitive Gap tool — how to identify and close on-page SEO gaps against top-ranking competitors.

item.title: Behind the Scenes: Developing Traffic Torch's AI SEO and UX Tools
item.description: Platform updates including educational infographic banners across tools, behind-the-scenes on building instant, private, educational SEO/UX auditing.

item.title: Traffic Torch SEO UX Analysis Tool Build: Behind the Scenes in Development
item.description: Revolutionizing free SEO/UX auditing — instant, private, deeply educational tool development story and early features.
